description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI/CD that runs on push to master and develop branches and on pull requests to these branches. Use a build job with a matrix strategy to test on multiple OS and Python versions, including ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest with Python 3.9, and additional Python versions 3.5-3.8 and pypy3 on ubuntu-latest. For each job, check out the code, set up Python, install dependencies with make install, run tests with make test or nosetests, and upload coverage to Codecov for ubuntu-latest with Python 3.9.
